name: Rundll32 with Suspicious Process Lineage
notes: This rule detects executions of rundll32.exe from unusual parent processes.
conditions_text: when the event matches Log Source Type is Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") == 'rundll32.exe' AQL filter query
when the event matches LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") MATCHES '(winword|excel|msaccess|lsass|taskeng|winlogon|schtask|regsvr32|wmiprvse|wsmprovhost)\.exe' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Rundll32 with Suspicious Process Lineage on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches Log Source Type is Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") == 'rundll32.exe' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") MATCHES '(winword|excel|msaccess|lsass|taskeng|winlogon|schtask|regsvr32|wmiprvse|wsmprovhost)\.exe' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Rundll32 with Suspicious Process Lineage
Event description: Detects executions of rundll32.exe from unusual parent processes
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
